# Raw Extraction

```markdown
shows the high-limit shut-off settings for different types of air economizers.
**Table A-5.2.2.8.(2)**
**High-Limit Shut-off (HLSO) Control Settings for Air Economizers**
|TypeofHLSOControl(1)|ConditionsatwhichAirEconomizerTurnsOff|Col3|
|---|---|---|
|Type of HLSO Control(1)|Equation(2)|Description|
|Fixed dry bulb(3)|TOA > Tsetpoint, where 21°C ≤Tsetpoint ≤24°C|Outdoor air temperature exceeds HLSO<br>set-point temperature of air economizer|
|Differential dry bulb|TOA > TRA|Outdoor air temperature exceeds return air<br>temperature|
|Electronic enthalpy(4)|(TOA,RHOA) > A|Outdoor air temperature/RH exceeds the “A”<br>setpoint curve(5)|
|Differential enthalpy|hOA > hRA|Outdoor air enthalpy exceeds return air enthalpy|
|Dew-point and dry-bulb temperatures|DPoa > 13°C or Toa > 24°C|Outdoor air dry bulb exceeds 24°C or outside<br>dewpoint exceeds 13°C(65gr/lb)|
```
